case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 FILING FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,450.00, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR TERMS
